sources.authority: Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera (IPMA)
sources.notes: IPMA official weather warnings (Avisos Meteorológicos) for up to 3 days ahead. Fields: awarenessTypeName (e.g. Wind, Precipitation, Rough Sea, Fog, Heat, Cold), awarenessLevelID (green/yellow/orange/red), idAreaAviso, startTime, endTime, descriptive text. Updated continuously.

sources.authority: Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera (IPMA)
sources.notes: 5-day daily forecast per district capital / island (aggregate hp-dc1-day). Includes temperature, precipitation probability, wind. Per-location alternative: /forecast/meteorology/cities/daily/{globalIdLocal}.json (e.g. 1110600 for Lisbon).

sources.authority: Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera (IPMA)
sources.notes: Real-time surface meteorological observations from the IPMA station network (temperature, humidity, wind, pressure, precipitation).

sources.authority: Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera (IPMA)
sources.notes: Coastal sea locations catalogue used as the basis for IPMA coastal/marine forecasts (sea state, wave height, sea temperature) keyed by location id.
QualAR air quality ArcGIS MapServer (QAR) with Air Quality Index layers for O3, SO2, NO2, PM10, PM2.5 and global index. Supports JSON and geoJSON query output. Near-real-time station measurements.

sources.authority: Sistema Nacional de Informação de Recursos Hídricos (SNIRH), APA
sources.notes: SNIRH bathing waters classification MapServer (balneares). Part of the broader SNIRH water-resources monitoring (hydrometric, piezometry, water quality). Visualizador also exposes SNIRH layers via the same ArcGIS REST service.
FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Portuguese mainland/Atlantic bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time and location. Pan-European; use bbox params to scope to Portugal.
